care provided to 
patients with wounds, including any necessary dressing changes on those wounds. While 
a wound might not require this skilled nursing care, the wound may still require skilled 
monitoring for signs and symptoms of infection or complication (see §40.1.2.1) or for 
skilled teaching of wound care to the patient or the patient's family (see §40.1.2.3). For 
an example of when wound care is provided separately from the furnishing of NPWT 
using a disposable device, see §50.4.4.
